## Description

What does this PR change, and why?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Paper content correction or addition
- [ ] Documentation update (`docs/`)
- [ ] Diagram addition/update (`diagrams/`)
- [ ] Implementation scope (`implementation/`)
- [ ] Repository tooling / CI (`scripts/`, `.github/`)
- [ ] Other (describe above)

## Related Issue

Closes #(issue number), if applicable.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] For factual/citation changes, I've included the supporting primary
      source (NIST FIPS, IETF RFC/draft, peer-reviewed paper) in this PR
      description
- [ ] If `paper/paper.tex` was modified, I have rebuilt the PDF locally
      using `./scripts/compile-latex.sh` and verified it compiles cleanly
- [ ] If `paper/references.bib` was modified, I have run
      `./scripts/generate-bib.sh` and resolved any warnings
- [ ] Markdown changes render correctly when previewed
      (headers, tables, image paths)
- [ ] Commit messages follow the
      [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
      described in `CONTRIBUTING.md`

## Additional Notes

Anything else reviewers should know.
